_comment: Scenario definitions consumed by `cargo run --example capture_traces` and `cargo test --test replay_traces`. Add or edit scenarios here without touching any .rs file. Each scenario is a real prompt + tools setup that we send to every provider. The captured request / response live under tests/cross_provider/traces/<provider>/<scenario>.{request.json,response.sse,meta.json}.

scenarios.name: text_only
scenarios.description: Single user prompt, expect a short free-form response. Smallest possible streaming round-trip. max_tokens leaves headroom for thinking-model overhead (Gemini 2.5 burns reasoning tokens before emitting output).

messages.content: Say the single word 'hello' and nothing else.

scenarios.name: system_and_user
scenarios.description: System instruction + user prompt — exercises role mapping and (for Vertex) systemInstruction routing.

messages.content: You are a terse parrot. Reply with exactly the word the user gives you, lowercased.

scenarios.name: function_call
scenarios.description: Prompt + one tool, expect the model to emit a function call. Locks in the tool-call wire shape.

messages.content: What's the weather in Paris? Use the get_weather tool.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a city.
